claims.claim: Colombia covers 1,141,748 square kilometers in northwestern South America
Colombia has coastlines on both the Pacific Ocean and Caribbean Sea
Colombia shares land borders with Brazil, Ecuador, Peru, Venezuela, and Panama
The Colombian Andes divides into three branches: Cordillera Central, Cordillera Oriental, and Cordillera Occidental
Pico Cristobal Colon reaches 18,950 feet as Colombia's highest peak
Eastern Colombia consists primarily of tropical plains and rainforests, housing agricultural estates and oil reserves
Family unity remains central to Colombian social organization
Soccer dominates recreational activities in Colombia
Dating customs typically begin around ages 14-15 in Colombia
Petro canceled Venezuelan meeting following a telephone conversation with Donald Trump
